[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101111000 5
1 010100000 2
2 000111100 4
3 011111011 7
4 011111000 5
5 010111000 4
6 110101000 4
7 111101000 5

01 10 000100000 1
12 21 001111010 5
23 32 010011000 3
34 43 010011000 3
45 54 010101000 3
56 65 111101000 5 match 7
67 76 110000000 2
70 07 000000000 a

02 20 000100000 1
13 31 000011100 3
24 42 010111001 5
35 53 010001000 2
46 64 010111000 4 match 5
57 75 110000000 2
60 06 000100000 1
71 17 100000000 1

03 30 000000000 a
14 41 000111000 3
25 52 011101000 4
36 63 010011000 3
47 74 010000000 1
50 05 000100000 1
61 16 101111000 5 match 0
72 27 010000000 1

04 40 000100000 1
15 51 101101000 4
26 62 011111000 5 match 4
37 73 010000000 1
